calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Schindler, Esq., 415-398-3344, for defendant and moving party Wells Fargo Bank. No other appearances.

The moving party appeared and the Court modifies its tentative ruling, to add 7th cause of action, as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT-First cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. 2nd thru 6th causes of action sustained with leave to amend; re 6th cause of action, injunctive relief should be replead as remedy. 7th cause of action 2923.5 is sustained without leave to amend. Not applicable. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To Feb-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to February 29, 2012 at 9:30am to be heard in department 501. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION will be heard the same day and time by Judge Quidachay in Department 501. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiffs Tony Chou and Min Ying Liang's Order to show cause regarding preliminary injunction is denied. 1) CCC 2923.5 not applicable. Limited to 1/1/03 to 12/31/07. 2) No possibility of success. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.

Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Continued To Jan-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARIA SCHINDLER OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 398-3344 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 6, 2012 PER THE PARTIES STIPULATION. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
